title: Dual Stack Premium Silk-Satin Color Bundle
overview: Two curated stacks of lustrous silk-satin fabrics in fourteen sophisticated solid colors for elegant dressmaking.
description: This premium bundle features neatly folded silk-satin fabrics in black, royal blue, fuchsia, teal, mustard, maroon, grey, white, brown, burnt orange, lavender, red, and light pink. Each piece offers a smooth sheen and soft drape perfect for evening wear, linings, and luxury African attire.

title: Seven-Tone Premium Tailoring Fabric Roll Collection
overview: Seven upright luxury fabric rolls in magenta, sky blue, pastel pink, indigo, cream, mustard, and black.
description: Premium medium-weight tailoring textiles with a fine consistent grain and soft folds at the base. Available in magenta, sky blue, baby pink, deep indigo, ivory cream, warm mustard, and classic black — ideal for bespoke suits, formal dresses, and luxury traditional wear.
features: Ideal for formal wear and tailoring

title: Eleven-Shade Premium Satin Fabric Stack
overview: Eleven-fold stack of lustrous satin fabrics from white through royal blue in rich solid hues.
description: A vertical stack of premium satin fabrics in white, burnt orange, deep purple, champagne, navy, bright yellow, teal, mustard gold, obsidian black, fuchsia, and royal blue. Smooth reflective surfaces with elegant drape for bridal, evening, and luxury fashion projects.
features: Ideal for evening and bridal wear

title: Multi-Color Silk-Satin Standing Fabric Rolls
overview: Nine premium silk-satin rolls in white, mauve, terracotta, olive, lavender, ochre, and royal blue.
description: Elite standing fabric rolls with a subtle elegant sheen in white, dusty rose, burnt orange, olive green, lavender, mustard yellow, and cobalt blue. Protected with clear plastic wrapping, these fabrics are perfect for sophisticated evening wear and premium traditional attire.

title: Italy Super 300 Wool Cashmere Suiting Rolls
overview: Italian Fashion Design Super 300 quality wool and cashmere suiting in blue, teal, mustard, and lavender.
description: Premium suiting fabric rolls with gold-embroidered selvedges reading Italy Fashion Design, Quality Wool, Super 300's, and Cashmere. Available in bright blue, navy purple, teal, mustard yellow, medium blue, lavender, and royal blue for bespoke suits and blazers.

title: Super 180 Wool Cashmere Italian Suiting Collection
overview: Extrafine Super 180's wool and cashmere Italian suiting in sand, sky blue, navy, cream, green, and royal blue.
description: Made in Italy suiting fabrics with five-star extra fine quality selvedges. Includes sand beige, sky blue, navy blue, cream off-white, Kelly green, royal blue, and lavender-pink striped options. Super 180's weave for exceptionally soft bespoke tailoring.

title: Cool-Tone Sapphire Satin Fabric Stack
overview: Five-fold stack of lustrous satin in sky blue, royal blue, charcoal, steel blue, and navy tones.
description: A curated cool-tone satin collection featuring pale sky blue, vibrant royal blue, charcoal grey, steel blue, and deep navy fabrics. Each piece has a smooth reflective sheen and elegant drape for formal wear, bridal accents, and sophisticated accessories.

title: Italian Windowpane Wool Cashmere Suiting Rolls
overview: Premium Italian Super 180s wool and cashmere suiting with windowpane checks and plaid patterns in blues and burgundy.
description: Nine distinct suiting bolts including navy solid, light blue windowpane, dark navy check, medium blue, plum burgundy plaid, royal blue cashmere, textured micro-check, charcoal brown check, and chocolate brown windowpane. Made in Italy with gold selvedge lettering.

title: Vibrant Solid Premium Crepe Fabric Rolls
overview: Six large upright crepe rolls in magenta, bubblegum pink, lavender, royal blue, orange, and hot pink.
description: Professional-grade solid-colored fabric rolls with smooth uniform texture and intense color saturation. Magenta, bright pink, pale lavender, royal blue, vibrant orange, and hot pink — perfect for high-end fashion design, elegant traditional attire, and bespoke garments.

title: Spectrum Color Luxury Fabric Roll Lineup
overview: Eleven vibrant luxury fabric rolls from mustard and indigo through maroon, sky blue, and dusty rose.
description: A stunning lineup of solid-colored textile rolls in mustard yellow, indigo, bright purple, lime green, burnt orange, white, royal blue, magenta, maroon, sky blue, and dusty rose. Smooth matte-to-semi-gloss finish ideal for luxury evening wear and bespoke tailoring.

title: Dual Column Lustrous Satin Fabric Stack
overview: Two stacks of twenty-six lustrous satin fabrics in olive, royal blue, peach, maroon, lime, red, orange, pink, cobalt, teal, and rust.
description: Premium satin fabrics arranged in two tall columns featuring olive green, white, royal blue, peach, maroon, lime, red, orange, hot pink, cobalt, burnt orange, turquoise, rust, black, rose pink, petrol blue, golden yellow, mauve, crimson, navy, fuchsia, cream, eggplant, and dusty rose.

title: Six-Shade Matte Luxury Dress Fabric Rolls
overview: Six premium crepe rolls in magenta, red, yellow, mint green, cyan blue, and gold with subtle sheen.
description: High-quality solid-colored fabric bolts in deep magenta, bright red, sunny yellow, mint seafoam green, vivid cyan blue, and gold yellow. Smooth matte finish with protective plastic wrapping — ideal for luxury dressmaking and high-end fashion projects.

title: Wrapped Premium Solid Fabric Color Spectrum
overview: Fourteen large fabric rolls in black, lavender, burgundy, cream, yellow, white, magenta, royal blue, terracotta, indigo, chartreuse, mustard, sky blue, and rose.
description: Premium solid-colored fabrics with smooth lustrous finish displayed as fourteen upright rolls partially wrapped in clear protective plastic. Rich color spectrum from deep black through vibrant magentas and soft pastels for elegant evening wear and traditional luxury attire.

title: Assorted Cashmere Superfine Wool Suiting Shelf
overview: Mixed shelf display of cashmere, Super 120s, and superfine wool suiting in plum, olive, terracotta, tan, lime, blue, charcoal, mustard, red, and brown.
description: Premium suiting collection featuring horizontal rolls in plum, olive, and terracotta plus vertical bolts in camel tan cashmere, lime superfine wool, medium blue, charcoal Super 120s, mustard high-quality wool, beige, bright red superfine wool, royal blue, chocolate brown, and white.

title: Jewel Tone Satin Evening Fabric Stack
overview: Five-fold satin stack in charcoal, chartreuse, teal, burgundy, and high-shine black with metallic sheen.
description: Premium satin fabrics stacked in charcoal grey, vibrant lime green, rich teal forest green, deep wine maroon, and obsidian black with high-gloss finish. Luxurious drape and reflective surfaces perfect for evening gowns, luxury wrappers, and sophisticated separates.

title: Premium Solid Crepe Dressmaking Fabric Stacks
overview: Dual stacks of matte crepe fabrics in sky blue, terracotta, navy, forest green, cream, brown, black, azure, peach, royal blue, white, mustard, and maroon.
description: High-grade plain dressmaking fabrics with smooth matte opaque finish in thirteen sophisticated solid colors. Excellent drape and rich pigmentation for elegant luxury garments, flowing evening gowns, structured traditional attire, and chic office wear.

title: Grand Satin Color Archive Fabric Stack
overview: Two tall stacks of twenty-six premium satin fabrics in blush, black, magenta, lime, teal, mustard, purple, red, navy, fuchsia, champagne, plum, olive, white, sky blue, peach, maroon, chartreuse, scarlet, tangerine, hot pink, cobalt, orange, turquoise, and rust.
description: An extensive satin color archive featuring twenty-six distinct hues across two columns. Each fabric offers brilliant sheen, soft touch, and vibrant color fastness for evening wear, skirts, blouses, and high-end garment linings.

title: Italian Extrafine Wool Cashmere Mixed Suiting
overview: Extrafine wool and cashmere Italian suiting in grass green, royal blue, charcoal, sky blue, maroon, grey, and sage.
description: Made in Italy Super 180's wool and cashmere blend suiting with manufacturer tags showing 150cm width and 3.5m length. Colors include grass green, royal blue, dark charcoal, light sky blue, chocolate maroon, slate grey, and pale sage green.

title: Dense Lustrous Satin Color Wall Stack
overview: Dense multi-color satin stack featuring burgundy, royal blue, forest green, white, mustard, hot pink, emerald, terracotta, teal, peach, lime, and black.
description: A rich wall of folded premium satin fabrics in deep burgundy, royal blue, forest green, pristine white, mustard yellow, hot pink, emerald green, burnt orange, teal blue, champagne peach, lime green, and classic black. High-quality reflective surfaces for statement fashion pieces.

title: Workshop Silk-Satin Eight Tone Fabric Stack
overview: Eight-tone silk-satin stack in purple, chartreuse, burgundy, navy, olive, cream, sky blue, and mustard gold.
description: Premium silk-satin fabrics in deep purple, lime chartreuse, burgundy maroon, midnight navy, olive green, cream off-white, bright sky blue, and golden mustard. Lightweight with subtle metallic glow and soft hand-feel for luxury blouses, gowns, and apparel linings.

title: Royal Blue Pinstripe Super 180 Wool Suiting
overview: Royal blue Super 180 wool and cashmere pinstripe suiting alongside beige, green, orange, charcoal, and grey Italian fabrics.
description: Wooden shelf display of premium Italian suiting including light blue striped, light grey, beige textured, forest green, burnt orange, charcoal birdseye, medium grey, charcoal, and prominent royal blue pinstripe Super 180 wool and cashmere with gold selvedge lettering.

title: Gold Selvedge Executive Suiting Fabric Rolls
overview: Executive suiting rolls with gold-lettered selvedges in maroon, sky blue, royal purple, white, silver grey, camel, and charcoal.
description: Premium wool and cashmere blend suiting featuring signature gold selvedge detailing. Deep maroon, sky blue, royal purple, pristine white, silver grey, classic camel tan, and charcoal grey options with Super 150s to Super 180s fine weave quality.

title: Neutral Elegance Designer Fabric Roll Set
overview: Five designer fabric rolls in silver-grey, charcoal, white, and dual blush peach crepe with brand labels.
description: Premium designer textile rolls in elegant silver-grey satin, deep charcoal matte suiting, crisp white linen-cotton blend, and two soft blush peach fluid crepe varieties. Professional retail quality with clean selvage edges for high-end fashion design.

title: Super 120 Wool Cashmere Pastel Suiting Shelf
overview: Super 120 wool and cashmere suiting shelf in cream, chocolate, tan, navy, olive, silver, purple, charcoal, lime, burgundy, salmon, and grey.
description: Italian tailoring shelf featuring cream, chocolate brown, tan beige, navy, olive khaki with star selvedge, silver-grey, royal purple, charcoal, pale lime, burgundy, salmon pink, and light grey bolts plus patterned purple geometric and teal checkered folded pieces.

title: Pastel Spectrum Luxury Fabric Roll Lineup
overview: Fourteen upright luxury fabric rolls from black and lavender through yellow, white, magenta, royal blue, terracotta, indigo, chartreuse, mustard, sky blue, and rose.
description: Premium solid-colored textile lineup in black, lavender, maroon burgundy, beige cream, bright yellow, white, hot pink magenta, royal blue, burnt orange terracotta, deep indigo, lime olive, mustard gold, sky blue, and soft rose pink with smooth semi-gloss finish.

title: Blush Jewel Satin Fabric Bundle Stack
overview: Six-tone satin bundle in dusty rose, fuchsia, mauve, crimson, lavender, and deep plum with high-gloss finish.
description: Curated satin fabric bundle featuring pale dusty rose, bright fuchsia, muted mauve, deep crimson ruby, light lavender lilac, and rich dark plum violet. High-luster glossy finish with soft hand-feel for elegant evening wear and luxury linings.

title: Rainbow Solid Crepe Fabric Roll Collection
overview: Five premium crepe rolls in magenta, red, yellow, mint green, and royal blue with matte sophistication.
description: Premium solid-colored crepe fabric collection in deep magenta, bold red, sunny yellow, mint teal green, and vivid royal blue. Smooth matte texture with graceful drape for elegant dresses, stylish suits, and sophisticated evening wear.

title: Double Shelf Tailoring Wool Fabric Collection
overview: Twenty-three suiting rolls across two shelves in beige, mustard, olive, royal blue, charcoal, plum, yellow, teal, maroon, pinstripe, windowpane, and striped patterns.
description: Comprehensive tailoring collection with top shelf in beige, mustard, olive, royal blue, taupe, charcoal, silver, camel, plum, yellow, teal, and tan plus bottom shelf in maroon, heather grey, black pinstripe, navy micro-check, forest green, blue windowpane, striped purple, mauve, mustard, striped burgundy, and emerald green.

title: Boutique Rainbow Plain Fabric Shelf Display
overview: Multi-shelf boutique display of plain luxury fabrics in cyan, pink, olive, mint, plum, royal blue, lime, cream, grey, mustard, turquoise, lemon, terracotta, peach, black, fuchsia, navy, and brown.
description: Professional boutique shelving with over twenty-five solid-colored premium fabrics in light cyan, pastel pink, olive, sandy beige, mint, deep plum, royal blue, sky blue, lime, cream, tan, silver-grey, mustard, charcoal, taupe, burgundy, golden yellow, slate grey, turquoise, lemon yellow, burnt orange, peach, black, fuchsia, navy, and chocolate brown.
features: Ideal for formal and ceremonial wear

title: Super 180 Windowpane Italian Suiting Collection
overview: Italian Super 180 wool and cashmere suiting with windowpane, checkered, and pinstripe patterns in maroon, navy, blue, purple, and grey.
description: Authentic Made in Italy suiting featuring maroon windowpane, navy windowpane, royal blue solid, purple-black buffalo check, charcoal pinstripe, light blue windowpane, and orange pinstripe fabrics with gold and silver star-rated selvedge detailing.

title: Elite Cashmere Super 120 Suiting Fabric Shelf
overview: Elite cashmere Super 120 suiting in sage, mustard, charcoal, turquoise, lavender, sky blue, brown, royal blue, grey, and blue striped.
description: Premium suiting shelf with sage green, mustard yellow, charcoal grey, vibrant turquoise, pale lavender, sky blue, chocolate brown, royal blue, light grey bolts plus blue-dark grey horizontal striped roll. Five-star cashmere selvedge markings throughout.

title: Waffle Weave Cotton Luxury Fabric Collection
overview: Ten-color waffle-weave honeycomb cotton collection in sky blue, chocolate, cream, royal blue, turquoise, beige, navy, pink, white, and charcoal.
description: Distinctive waffle-weave textured fabrics in light sky blue, dark chocolate brown, cream off-white, royal blue, bright turquoise teal, sandy beige, navy blue, soft candy pink, crisp white, and charcoal black. Breathable absorbent material with sophisticated honeycomb structure.

title: Warm Tone Lustrous Satin Fabric Stack
overview: Five-fold warm-tone satin stack in pale gold, mustard yellow, bright orange, copper, and deep crimson red.
description: Premium lustrous satin fabrics in pale champagne gold, sunny mustard yellow, vibrant orange, burnt copper terracotta, and deep crimson red. Ultra-smooth silk-like texture with fluid drape for elegant evening wear, bridal accents, and luxury linings.

title: Premium White Waffle Weave Luxury Fabric
overview: Pure white medium-weight fabric with classic honeycomb waffle-weave texture and architectural drape.
description: Sophisticated pure white luxury fabric featuring an elegant waffle-weave honeycomb pattern providing visual depth and soft absorbent hand-feel. Crisp timeless color ideal for high-end loungewear, structured summer dresses, sophisticated resort wear, and luxury accessories.
